the Kaaba (object of Allah's making in this verse)
as a means of support/maintenance (object of جَعَلَ)

and the garlands/necklaces (as object of جَعَلَ)
that (pointing to what was just mentioned)
so that you all may know
that/indeed (emphasizing what follows: اللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ - Allah knows)
Allah (as the object of تَعْلَمُوا - that you know)
he knows/understands deeply (what is in the heavens and earth)
what/whatever/that which (refers to things in السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
of the heavens (in مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - what is in the heavens)
in/on the earth (after فِى in this ayah)
Allah (as the object of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
that indeed (emphasizes what comes after it)
Allah (the one true God who is being worshipped)
upon the messenger (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in مَّا عَلَى ٱلرَّسُولِ)
except (connects ٱلْبَلٰغُ with what came before)
the conveying (of the message) (subject of إِلَّا)
And Allah (as the subject of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
you (all) reveal (what is in your hearts)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)
so protect yourselves! (command to a group)
they believed (referring to believers being addressed)
if (introduces condition for تُبْدَ - it will be shown)
it is shown/revealed (passive verb in تُبْدَ لَكُمْ - it will be shown to you)
for you all (object of تُبْدَ - it will be made clear)
it makes you all sad (referring to the questions mentioned in أَشْيَآءَ)
you (all) ask about (negative command with لَا)
when, at the time (of يُنَزَّلُ - it is being sent down)
it is being sent down repeatedly (the Quran)
it is made clear/apparent (passive voice, conditional)
for you all (being shown to in تُبْدَ)
about it/concerning it (referring to أَشْيَآءَ - things)
and Allah (as the subject of عَفَا/pardoned)
Most Patient, Most Forbearing (divine attribute of اللَّهُ)
he asked her/it (referring to a question mentioned earlier)
with it/her (referring to the questions mentioned earlier)
rejecters (as objects of أَصْبَحُوا - they became)
Allah (the one true God) (subject of جَعَلَ - made/ordained)
a she-camel whose ears have been split (a pre-Islamic practice)
a she-camel set free for idols (object of جَعَلَ)
a female camel that is joined (to another)
they understand (referring to those who disbelieve in يَفْتَرُونَ)
and when (introduces the condition قِيلَ 'it is said')
it was said (to لَهُمْ - to them)
he caused to descend/sent down (subject of اللَّهُ)
The One True God (subject of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
sufficient for us (as subject of قَالُوا)
what/that which (refers to ما أنزل الله - what Allah revealed)
they know/understand (referring to those who follow their forefathers blindly)
they believed (subject of يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ - O you who)
your selves (referring to the believers being addressed)
he harms you all (لَا negates this harm)
he went completely astray (subject of يَضُرُّكُم)
then he will inform you all thoroughly
you all were (past tense, referring to the believers addressed in يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
they believed/had faith (referring to believers being addressed)
the testimony (subject of what comes after)
when (introduces the condition of حَضَرَ/death approaching)
one of you (being acted upon by حَضَرَ)
the testament (possessed by or connected to something else)
or (connects two options: witnesses from among you OR from others)
two others (referring to two witnesses from outside the community)
other than you all (referring to the believers being addressed)
if (introduces the condition for ضَرَبْتُمْ - you traveled)
and then it afflicted you all (referring to مُّصِيبَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ - the affliction of death)
you all hold back both of them
and then they both swear an oath (after being detained)
by/with Allah (as the one they swear by in يُقْسِمَانِ - they both swear)
and even if (hypothetical condition in وَلَا نَكْتُمُ)
this/that (referring to something of close proximity)
we hide/conceal (شَهٰدَةَ ٱللَّهِ - the testimony of Allah)
indeed we (the speakers in يُقْسِمَانِ - they both swear)
in that case/therefore (connects to إِنَّآ - indeed we)
then if (connecting to what comes after عُثِرَ)
it was discovered (subject of إِنْ - if)
then two others (who will take their place)
they both stand/rise up (present, referring to the two others who will take their place)
from/of (connecting الَّذِينَ to what comes before)
those who (referring to the two witnesses mentioned earlier)
so they both swear an oath (connected to يَقُومَانِ - they both stand)
by Allah (used in swearing an oath)
and not (in the context of وَمَا ٱعْتَدَيْنَآ - and we did not transgress)
then/in that case (showing consequence of ٱسْتَحَقَّآ إِثْمًا - if they earned sin)
that (introduces the verb يَأْتُوا - they come/bring)
on, upon (preposition showing position over وَجْهِهَآ)
and protect yourselves (command to a group)
Allah (as the object of وَٱتَّقُوا۟ - fear/be mindful of)

on the day (when يَجْمَعُ Allah will gather)
he gathers (the subject is اللَّهُ - Allah)
Allah (as the subject of يَجْمَعُ - He gathers)
and then he says (after Allah gathers the messengers)
what? (asking about the response given to the messengers)
for us (in response to قَالُوا - they said)
the unseen things (possessed by عَلَّامُ - the All-Knower)
when (introducing a past event in قَالَ ٱللَّهُ - Allah said)
O Jesus! (being directly addressed by Allah)
remember! (command to Muhammad ﷺ from Allah)
and upon (connected to وٰلِدَتِكَ - your mother)
the people (as object of تُكَلِّمُ - you speak to)
in (connects تُكَلِّمُ 'you speak' to ٱلْمَهْدِ 'the cradle')
the cradle (that Jesus spoke from as a baby)
and a mature adult (object of تُكَلِّمُ - you speak to)
and when (connecting to previous blessings mentioned)
I taught you intensively (object of the verb)
the book (object of عَلَّمْتُكَ - I taught you)
and the wisdom (object of عَلَّمْتُكَ - I taught you)
and the Gospel (as the object being taught)
and when (connecting to previous mentions of Allah's favors)
like/similar to the form/shape (in genitive case)
then it becomes (result of فَتَنفُخُ/then you blow)
a bird (as the thing being affected)
by My permission (referring to Allah's permission)
the one who is born blind
and when (connecting to previous reminders to Jesus)
you bring out (the dead, mentioned in context)
the dead ones (object of تُخْرِجُ - you bring out)
by my permission (connected to تَخْلُقُ - you create)
and when (connecting this event with the previous miracles mentioned)
I prevented/held back (the بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ from harming عِيسَى)
Israel (meaning 'one who struggles/persists with God', name of Prophet Jacob)
away from you (object of كَفَفْتُ/I restrained)
when (referring to the time when Allah held back the Children of Israel)
then he said (following what was mentioned before about Jesus)
from them (referring to بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ - Children of Israel)
this (pointing to something in the ayah)
except (excluding سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ from what came before)
and when (connecting to أَوْحَيْتُ - I inspired)
that (introduces what was told to الْحَوَارِيِّۦنَ)
they spoke/said (the disciples responding to Jesus)
we believed (subject of قَالُوا - they said)

son (being addressed as 'O son of Mary')
do? does? (asks a yes/no question before يَسْتَطِيعُ)
he is able to (subject of يُنَزِّلَ)
that he sends down (object of يَسْتَطِيعُ/is able)
a spread of food (being sent down)
of the sky/heaven (describing مَآئِدَةً - a table)
we want (subject of قَالُوا - they said)
and it definitely becomes peaceful (by itself)
our hearts (subject of تَطْمَئِنَّ - become assured)
and we know (subjunctive: and that we know)
that (introduces what they want to do)
indeed/certainly (emphasizes صَدَقْتَنَا - 'you have spoken truth to us')
you told us truth (referring to Allah telling truth to the disciples)
and that we be/exist (connected to نُرِيدُ أَن - we want that)
upon it (referring to the table they want to eat from)
the witnesses (of صَدَقْتَنَا - you were truthful to us)
our Lord (being called upon by عِيسَى)
cause to descend!/send down! (command to one person)
a table with food (object of أَنزِلْ - send down)
for us (connected to تَكُونُ - it will be)
a festival (object of تَكُونُ - it will be)
and our last ones (connected to أَوَّلِنَا - our first)
and You (addressing Allah as the best of providers)
indeed I (speaking before مُنَزِّلُهَا/I will send it down)
I will send it down (object is عَلَيْكُمْ - upon you)

from you all (referring to those who disbelieve after the table is sent down)
I punish him severely (object of عَذَابًا)
a punishment (that I will punish with)
and when (introducing what Allah said to Jesus)
Allah (as the subject of قَالَ - He said)
he said (subject of قَالَ ٱللَّهُ - Allah said)
Your absolute perfection and glory! (addressing Allah in this ayah)
that which (object of أَقُولَ - I say)

if (introduces condition for قُلْتُهُ - I said it)
you know (what is in نَفْسِى - myself)
in (what is in نَفْسِكَ - your self)
and not (connected to أَعْلَمُ - I know)
I know (in response to تَعْلَمُ - you know)

you (subject of قُلْتَ - did you say)
of the hidden things (possessed by عَلَّامُ - All-Knower)
to/for them (referring to what Jesus said to his people)

what (object of أَمَرْتَنِى - you commanded me)
Allah (as the object of اعْبُدُوا - worship)
a witness (describing Jesus's role watching over his people)
while/as long as (connecting دُمْتُ - I remained)

among them (referring to the people Jesus was sent to)

you were (speaking to Jesus in this ayah)
you (masculine singular, subject of كُنتَ - you were)
upon them (referring to the people Jesus was sent to)
and you (subject of كُنتَ - you were)
if (followed by تُعَذِّبْهُمْ - you punish them)

you forgive (in response to إِن 'if' before it)
for/to them (referring to عِبَادُكَ - Your servants)

the mighty, powerful one (subject of أَنتَ)
he benefits/helps (subject of يَوْمُ - this day)
the truthful ones (object of يَنفَعُ - benefits)
their truth (referring to the truthful people ٱلصَّادِقِينَ)

the success (the ultimate achievement mentioned in this ayah)
the great, the mighty (describing الْفَوْزُ - the triumph)

and He/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)
every (connected to شَىْءٍ to mean 'every thing')
